cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So, the question is about determining the possible time Richard could have gone to the bakery based on the given information. Let's start by breaking down the information provided. First, the key points: 1. Richard woke up at 8am. So he couldn't have gone to the bakery before 8am. 2. Betty saw Richard at the library from 9am to 2pm. That means during that time, he was reading and not at the bakery. 3. David saw him at the electronic store fixing a computer from 2pm to 4pm. So another time slot where he was occupied. 4. Mary saw him taking photos near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm. Still occupied. 5. Hannah saw him on a rooftop from 5pm to 6pm. More time accounted for. 6. Susan saw him driving to the water park from 6pm to 7pm. So that's another activity. 7. The bakery was closed
